untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking MACD 'new extreme' and 'penetration sustained for minimum consecutive bars' — these require historical bar comparison and state tracking not expressible in single-bar rule conditions. Also requires channel boundary definition which is not specified (Donchian used as proxy). MACD lag accounting cannot be explicitly parameterized in this rule format.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as channel boundary proxy since specific channel type not defined. MACD crossover used as momentum confirmation. Volume ratio confirms move. Penetration sustenance and lag compensation require backtester state management beyond this schema's scope.
